title: Daily Email of Upcoming Due Dates and Timelines
excerpt: I am having no luck setting up an automation to send me (I’m the only user on my board) a daily email which shows the following - upcoming due dates that week and anything with a timeline that started on the day of the e…

posts.author: dgreensp (Darren Greenspoon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having no luck setting up an automation to send me (I’m the only user on my board) a daily email which shows the following - upcoming due dates that week and anything with a timeline that started on the day of the email. I have received nothing.

My automations are:
1 - When Timeline start date arrives notify DG
2 - 3 Days before Due Date arrives notify DG

I get nothing - no email, no notification in the app - NADA!

Help please!

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @dgreensp

If you want to get reminders according to data. So you can use EasyMails. Where you can create your own recipes.
Even you can customize your own templates(with drag and drop feature) to send dynamic mails.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dgreensp

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that allows generating reports and getting them by notification & email. These reports are built based on monday.com docs so you can export them PDF, collaborate, comment and more.

Here’s an example of how you can set a daily report of upcoming due dates →

Screenshot 2024-06-17 at 17.44.452252×466 34 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
